scope_contract: In --changed-files mode this inspector emits findings for the listed files and tags each finding with introduced_in_diff: bool per Mechanism (ii). Findings with introduced_in_diff: false are advisory/non-blocking per the default-safe rule (AC-2.6(b)). Global detector results are reported in mandatory_script_outputs.observations, NOT in findings.* arrays.
diff_aware_contract: Mechanism (ii): inspector-side tagging. Each finding in --changed-files mode carries an explicit introduced_in_diff field. Absent/null/untagged findings are non-blocking per AC-2.6 default-safe rule.

discover_folders.note: Folder rules loaded. All changed files conform to their respective folder README naming conventions.

detect_orphan_scripts.diff_scoping_note: None of these orphan scripts are in the changed-files scope for cycle dev-20260524-170335. All are pre-existing global-scan findings. introduced_in_diff: false for all. scripts/write-commit-grant.py and scripts/aggregate-dev-report.py (the two scripts in this diff) have confirmed functional references and are NOT in this list. All orphan-script findings here are pre-existing advisory, non-blocking under --changed-files mode.
detect_orphan_scripts.false_positive_note: Codex identified the 13 scripts/todo/*.py entries as false positives: these scripts are dynamically loaded by hooks/hook-todo-injection.py via the pattern scripts/todo/{command}.py. Deleting them would break the todo-injection hook convention. They are NOT true orphans. scripts/bulk-commit-nested-run.sh and scripts/install/tmp-cleanup-install.sh modified < 7 days ago are protected by the Safety Rules age threshold.

Keep — dynamically loaded by hooks/hook-todo-injection.py via scripts/todo/{command}.py pattern. The detect-orphan-scripts.sh script does not recognize dynamic hook-based loading. These are NOT orphans.

summary.close_gate_rationale: Zero cleanliness violations introduced in this diff. All 8 changed files are correctly placed, correctly named per their folder conventions, and actively referenced. scripts/aggregate-dev-report.py is a new file in scripts/ (correctly placed, kebab-case, referenced by close.md and dev.md). BASH_MAX_CONSECUTIVE update in both CLAUDE.md and pretool-orchestrator-gate.py is consistent. All global detector findings are pre-existing and non-blocking per default-safe rule.

codex_consult.feedback_summary: Codex returned 5 findings (4 with PROPOSED_FIX, 1 OBSERVATION_ONLY). F1: scope error — global pre-existing rows should not appear under findings.* arrays in --changed-files mode; move to mandatory_script_outputs.observations. F2: false positive — product-owner.md is referenced by commands/dev.md and commands/dev-command.md as a specialist agent. F3: false positives — scripts/todo/*.py are dynamically loaded by hooks/hook-todo-injection.py via the {command}.py convention, not true orphans. F4: safety calibration — bulk-commit-nested-run.sh and tmp-cleanup-install.sh are < 7 days old; safe_to_delete:false required. F5: summary overcounts — total_issues should reflect changed-file scope only (0), not global advisory count. OBSERVATION_ONLY: all 8 changed files are correctly placed and named; aggregate-dev-report.py is a new functional script with confirmed references.

findings.issue: Scope error in --changed-files mode: global pre-existing rows placed under findings.* even though none of those files is in the 8-file changed set
findings.proposed_fix: Keep findings.orphaned_subagents and findings.unreferenced_scripts empty for this run; move detector output to mandatory_script_outputs.observations with introduced_in_diff:false, blocking:false, cleanliness_finding:false
findings.rationale: This matches the established pattern from prior cycle reports (20260524-122947, 20260524-125300). findings.* arrays must be empty when no changed file has a cleanliness violation. Global detector results go to mandatory_script_outputs.observations only.

findings.issue: False positive: agents/product-owner.md is not truly orphaned; it is referenced by commands/dev.md and commands/dev-command.md as a specialist agent
findings.proposed_fix: Remove the product-owner.md item from orphaned_subagents, or reclassify as detector_false_positive / keep
findings.rationale: Verified via grep: commands/dev.md lines 139, 183, 193, 209 reference product-owner as a named specialist. The detect-orphan-agents.sh script does not recognize this reference form. The finding is a detector false positive and has been moved to the diff_scoping_note of the detect_orphan_agents mandatory script output.

findings.issue: False positives: all 13 scripts/todo/*.py rows correspond to slash commands and are dynamically loaded by hooks/hook-todo-injection.py via scripts/todo/{command}.py pattern; deleting them would violate Safety Rules
findings.proposed_fix: Remove the 13 scripts/todo/*.py entries from unreferenced_scripts, or mark them as dynamic_todo_script_convention, safe_to_delete:false, recommendation:keep
findings.rationale: Verified via grep: hooks/hook-todo-injection.py line 66 and surrounding context loads scripts/todo/{cmd_name}.py. The detect-orphan-scripts.sh script does not detect this dynamic loading pattern. All todo scripts are functional and must be retained. Marked as false_positive_note in mandatory_script_outputs.detect_orphan_scripts.

findings.issue: Safety calibration: scripts/bulk-commit-nested-run.sh (6 days) and scripts/install/tmp-cleanup-install.sh (2 days) are recent; delete recommendation would violate the <7 days Safety Rule
findings.proposed_fix: Add safe_to_delete:false, blocking:false, recommendation:'do not delete now; re-check after age threshold and reference verification'
findings.rationale: Safety Rules state files modified <7 days must not be deleted. Both scripts are within that window. Applied safe_to_delete:false in observations entries.

findings.issue: Summary overstates changed-file cleanliness findings: total_issues:16, major:10, minor:6 counts out-of-scope advisory/global detector output as findings
findings.proposed_fix: Set changed-file summary to total_issues:0, critical:0, major:0, minor:0; optionally add advisory_observations_count
findings.rationale: The summary must reflect only introduced_in_diff findings for the --changed-files scope. All 16 previously counted items are pre-existing advisory global scan results. Corrected to 0 + advisory_observations_count:17.

findings.issue: OBSERVATION_ONLY: The 8 changed files appear correctly placed/named. scripts/aggregate-dev-report.py is a new functional script, correctly in scripts/, kebab-case, and referenced by commands/close.md and commands/dev.md; no cleanliness finding needed.
findings.rationale: Confirms the inspector's verdict that aggregate-dev-report.py has no cleanliness issues. Logged for completeness.

codex_consult.feedback_incorporated: All 5 PROPOSED_FIX items applied: (1) findings.* arrays cleared; global detector results moved to mandatory_script_outputs.observations with introduced_in_diff/blocking/cleanliness_finding tags; (2) product-owner.md false positive documented in detect_orphan_agents diff_scoping_note; (3) scripts/todo/*.py false positives documented with dynamic_todo_script_convention classification and safe_to_delete:false; (4) bulk-commit-nested-run.sh and tmp-cleanup-install.sh observations now carry safe_to_delete:false and age-threshold note; (5) summary corrected to total_issues:0 with advisory_observations_count:17. OBSERVATION_ONLY item logged.
